title: NeuroGrim Agent Output
description: Versioned interface contract for -Mode agent JSON output. Schema version 1.

schema_version.description: Interface contract version. Consumers validate they understand this version.

scored_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when scoring was performed. Freshness guarantee for all consumers.

score.description: Unified confidence-weighted health score across all domains.

domains.description: Per-domain health scores. Keys are domain names from brain-registry.json.

score.description: Raw domain score before confidence weighting.

confidence.description: Confidence level in the domain score (0 = no data, 100 = fully observed).

weight.description: Domain weight in unified score. Advisory domains use 0.0.

dirty_gates.description: Gate keys with status 'dirty' (last run failed).

domain_variables.description: Cross-domain signal variables (domain:signal_name pattern). Values are booleans, integers, or strings.

command.description: Exact command to clear the gate.

blocks.description: What this gate blocks (commit, merge, deploy).

depends_on.description: Gate keys that should be cleared first.

skill.description: Skill reference for remediation guidance. Present only for gates in gate_skill_map.

correlations_fired.description: Cross-domain correlation rules that matched current state.

skill.description: Skill reference for remediation. Present when skill_remediation is defined.

incident_patterns.description: Matched incident patterns with enriched narratives.

hypothesis.description: Causal hypothesis explaining what the signals mean together.

narrative.description: Full narrative with signals, recurrence count, and remediation.

signals.description: Domain variables that triggered this pattern.

severity.description: Computed severity based on recurrence thresholds.

recurrence_count.description: Number of times this pattern has fired in the incident ledger.

affected_children.description: Child project IDs affected by this cross-project incident pattern (S4-FC-3). Only present when pattern references child.* variables.

skipped_temporal.description: Temporal incident patterns skipped due to missing ledger data.

proposal_effectiveness.description: Per-action-type effectiveness statistics from the proposal ledger.

avg_delta.description: Average score delta after executing this action type.

sample_count.description: Number of resolved proposals of this action type.

sufficient.description: Whether sample_count meets the minimum threshold for reliability.

effectiveness_rate.description: Fraction of resolved proposals where score delta > 0 (success rate).

success_count.description: Number of resolved proposals where score delta > 0.

recent_outcomes.description: Recent proposal outcomes from the last 7 days.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the proposal.

pre_score.description: Brain score before the proposal was executed.

post_score.description: Brain score after execution. Null if unresolved.

resolved.description: Whether the outcome has been resolved with a post_score.

hat.description: Hat that was active when the proposal was generated.

current_hat.description: Active hat name when -Hat parameter was provided.

current_human_persona.description: Active human-persona when --human-persona was provided. Hat controls WHAT is emphasized for the agent; human-persona controls HOW MUCH detail is shown to the human reader. Renamed from `current_persona` 2026-04-19.

suggested_hat.description: Hat suggestion based on domain variable signals.

reason.description: Hat description explaining why this hat is relevant.

trajectory.description: Unified score trajectory computed from score history (S5-TP-4).

velocity.description: Score change rate: avg(recent window) - avg(previous window)

classification.description: Trend classification based on velocity and volatility

samples.description: Number of score history snapshots used

children.description: Child Brain scores for ecosystem-level aggregation (S4-FC-2). Only present in -Mode ecosystem output.

score.description: Child unified score from its -Mode agent output.

scored_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp from child scoring. Used for freshness computation.

weight.description: Per-child weight from ecosystem-registry.json for aggregation.

freshness_multiplier.description: Freshness decay applied to child scored_at via Get-CmdbFreshnessMultiplier.

effective_score.description: Child score adjusted for confidence and freshness: score * (confidence/100) * freshness_multiplier.

domains.description: Pass-through of child domain scores from its -Mode agent output.

status.description: Child invocation result: ok (success), error (failed/invalid), stale (freshness < 0.5), disabled (registry disabled).
